theme: cut firebreaks before an unknown arsonist strikes
title: Firebreaks Against a Lattice Arsonist
strategies: trivial: cut the F highest-fuel cells; removes local fuel but never partitions, so the worst compartment stays huge (checker baseline)
greedy: straight walls at uniform equal-AREA positions (recursive bisection) -- ignores where fuel sits, so a skewed map overloads one compartment
strong: balanced graph PARTITION -- place walls at fuel QUANTILES so every compartment carries equal fuel; also search the vertical/horizontal split the budget affords
headroom above strong: 2D balanced partition / isolating the few ignition points inside the heaviest compartment instead of a separable quantile cut
